text:
A wise old owl lived deep in the forest. Every day he'd swoop down to visit some fellow creatures. This particular day, he was visiting chickens.

Howdy chicken friends!

Today I've got news. Our young chick has grown up fast!

They crowbedibly.

That's great news! Where'd you send little Miss Dove?

Oh oh! Just owl town!

You'll sing! Have you got any birdsongs she'd adore?

I've got beautiful warbling echoes! We think she'll love those!

Maybe you could visit her!

Sounds lovely.

You go anytime.


I hope you have lots of feathers!

That'd feel great.

Just do it!


That's owl-ish.


That's my chick!

Take nice care! I hear foxes these days.

Take 'em.

Don't worry.

I promise.


That feels good.


I think she'll think you're magical.

Good idea.



So glad?!

I wish!

That'll do.

We love that!

Until next owl
